'''Lanni Peggann''' was an intelligence agent who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

She had been assigned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Questal/Legends|Questal]] to watch [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bandor (Moff)|Bandor's]] activities. Her job has been compared to Bandor's intelligence chief, [[Ref Mawber]], but on the other side.

{{Char-stub}}
